entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange aggregator and trading platform operating since 2021. Jupiter expanded from swap routing into a broader exchange suite including limit and recurring orders, perpetual futures, token launch infrastructure, and additional onchain-finance products.
entity.notes: Year-level launch marker. HEI models Jupiter as one exchange entity rather than splitting its aggregator, perps, order, and other trading products.

events.title: Jupiter began operating as a Solana DEX aggregator
events.description: Jupiter began operating in 2021 as a liquidity-routing and decentralized exchange aggregation layer for Solana, later becoming a major trading interface and integration platform.
events.notes: The available official retrospective material supports 2021 but not one exact public launch day, so HEI stores a year-level marker.

events.title: Jupiter expanded its exchange infrastructure and perpetuals suite
events.description: Jupiter's Metis v1 routing engine launched in 2023 and the platform expanded into perpetual futures through Jupiter Perpetuals, broadening the exchange from swap aggregation into a multi-product trading venue.
events.notes: Year-level expansion marker; this event groups related product evolution rather than claiming a single-day platform relaunch.

evidence.title: Metis v7: Migration to Metis.builders
evidence.notes: Official retrospective stating that Jupiter's routing technology had been available to Solana builders since 2021.

evidence.title: Jupiter official application
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming continued operation under the Jupiter brand.

evidence.title: Jupiter routing documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation identifying Metis v1 as Jupiter's 2023 general-purpose liquidity engine and describing later routing evolution.

evidence.title: Jupiter Perpetuals overview
evidence.notes: Official documentation describing Jupiter Perpetuals as an active Solana perpetual futures exchange.
